title: selaginella rosea
intro: Selaginella rosea, also known as the red rose spikemoss, is a species of spikemoss that belongs to the family Selaginellaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Selaginella rosea include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. Selaginella rosea can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or powder, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall health and well-being.
